# Vendored Feature-3DGS Training Path

This directory is a trimmed local copy of the Feature-3DGS training path used by
GaussianPlant Step 1b.

It keeps only the code needed to distill per-view DINOtxt or DINOv3/JaFAR feature maps into a
feature 3DGS:

- `train.py`
- `arguments/`
- `scene/`
- `gaussian_renderer/`
- `utils/`
- `models/networks.py`
- `models/semantic_dataloader.py`

The upstream viewers, encoders, Windows binaries, and diff-gaussian rasterizer sources
are intentionally not included here. Rendering uses the project-local `gsplat` adapter
in `gaussian_renderer/__init__.py`.

Example:

```bash
cd third_party/feature-3dgs
/home/juxing/.conda/envs/gsplant/bin/python train.py \
  -s /mnt/c/Users/juxing/Projects/GaussianPlant/dataset/20251204_scene_pinhole \
  -m /mnt/c/Users/juxing/Projects/GaussianPlant/dataset/20251204_scene_pinhole/feature_pretrain \
  -f dinov3 \
  -r 0 \
  --iterations 30000 \
  --save_iterations 7000 15000 30000 \
  --test_iterations 7000 30000 \
  --quiet
```

Expected feature inputs:

- GaussianPlant format: `<scene>/dinov3_dim128/<image_stem>_dinov3_128.pth`
- Feature-3DGS format: `<scene>/dinov3_fmap/<image_stem>_fmap_CxHxW.pt`
- DINOtxt Feature-3DGS format: `<scene>/dinotxt_fmap/<image_stem>_fmap_CxHxW.pt`

In this project both are generated by `extract_dinov3_features.py` and contain the same
PCA-128 dense feature maps. The native DINOtxt-1024 path is generated by
`extract_dinotxt_features.py` and should be trained with `-f dinotxt`.
